title: Jeeva
desc: Jeeva, who has a natural talent in cricket, dreams of playing for the Indian cricket team. However, his love life and politics in the sports governing body become obstacles to his ambition.

title: Minnal Murali
desc: Jaison, a young tailor, gains superpowers after being struck by lightning. However, he must thwart the evil intentions of an unexpected adversary to become the superhero that his rural village needs.

title: Race Gurram
desc: In an attempt to put an end to the schemes of their enemy, two brothers join forces and stop at nothing to destroy the reign of a gangster who aspires to be a politician.

title: Kaaka Muttai
desc: Two young brothers from a Chennai slum dream of tatsing pizza, but their journey to fulfill this simple desire reveals the harsh realities of poverty and social inequality.

title: Lucky Baskhar
desc: Desperate to bring his family out of monetary woes, Bhaskar Kumar, a bank employee, enters the dangerous and murky world of financial scams.

title: Vikram
desc: Mourning cop Vikram and engineer Preethi team up to retrieve and disarm a missile.

title: Vikram
desc: Mourning cop Vikram and engineer Preethi team up to retrieve and disarm a missile.

title: Super Hit Songs
desc: A comprehensive compilation of the greatest super hit songs is played back to back in order to entertain and enthrall the audience.

title: Kadaram Kondan
desc: Vasu, a doctor, rescues KK, a criminal, from getting murdered in the hospital. However, when Vasu's wife gets kidnapped, he is asked to get KK out in exchange for his wife's safe return.

title: Super Hit Songs
desc: A comprehensive compilation of the greatest super hit songs is played back to back in order to entertain and enthrall the audience.

title: Nedunchalai
desc: Murugan steals groceries from passing trucks in order to make a living. However, things take a turn when he comes across Masani, a corrupt and perverted inspector.

title: Thandatti
desc: Subramani, almost retired, goes on a hunt to find her missing grandmother. However, the search creates more trouble for Subramani than she expected.

title: Lucky Baskhar
desc: Desperate to bring his family out of monetary woes, Bhaskar Kumar, a bank employee, enters the dangerous and murky world of financial scams.

title: Pulimurugan
desc: A small village seeks help from a man with extraordinary force to protect them against man-eating tigers and the drug mafia.

title: Eleven
desc: A seasoned police officer begins an investigation after a series of gruesome murders targeting twins comes to light. However, he soon encounters a sinister game of psychological manipulation.

title: Avan Ivan
desc: A benevolent landlord embraces two half-brothers as his chosen family, nurturing their dreams, but their lives take a perilous turn when they cross paths with a notorious cattle smuggler.
